column1: Luis Arraez leads the pack with a rock-steady bat and a prime leadoff spot, rolling into Baltimore with a hefty 72% hit probability and the platoon edge against Shane Baz. Right behind him, Paul Goldschmidt brings his own top-of-order reliability and a strong matchup versus Steven Matz in a hitter-friendly park—expect his consistent approach to shine. Xavier Edwards and Aaron Judge both offer steady profiles in good spots, but Arraez and Goldy set the pace for Beat The Streak players looking to keep their runs alive.
